_comment: Curated curriculum map. To extend: add an entry with `keywords` (lower-case substrings matched against a gap capability) and one or more `courses`. No code change required. `provider` is free-text; set realistic partners.

courses.title: Leading Teams & People Management
courses.relevance: Builds demonstrated people-leadership scope for higher-complexity roles.

courses.title: First-Time Manager Essentials
courses.relevance: Covers the management fundamentals a step-up role expects.

courses.title: Executive Stakeholder Engagement
courses.relevance: Develops senior-stakeholder and C-suite communication evidence.

courses.title: Management Consulting Toolkit
courses.relevance: Structured problem-solving and engagement skills for advisory roles.

courses.title: Kubernetes for Practitioners
courses.relevance: Hands-on orchestration skills mapping to cloud-native role requirements.

courses.title: Cloud Solution Architecture
courses.relevance: Architecture-level cloud design for senior technical roles.

courses.title: Applied Machine Learning
courses.relevance: Core ML competence for AI-augmented role transitions.

courses.title: AI Governance & Responsible AI
courses.relevance: Governance literacy increasingly required in senior AI roles.

courses.title: TOGAF Enterprise Architecture Foundations
courses.relevance: Formal EA credential frequently gating architecture-director roles.

courses.title: Product Management Fundamentals
courses.relevance: Product discipline for transitions into product-facing roles.

courses.title: Cybersecurity Essentials
courses.relevance: Security fundamentals for roles with a security mandate.
